markets.rules_secondary:
This market specifically encompasses the number of “Views” (not hours viewed) of
the top Show ranked on Netflix’s weekly charts for Global "Shows  | English"  chart.

The Netflix charts are updated on Tuesday. Therefore, the market will close at 11:59 PM ET the day before. The chart published on Mar 10, 2026 will be for the week ending the previous Sunday.
